# The Formula
![Requires](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/dqf94vyckp50yw0ohxsu4/r.png?rlkey=1w29drk0cgo454dh301cafwj9&st=oujarwn7&raw=1)[![ETF](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/ws960ahfkhfqnrsqkcilv/et.png?rlkey=w8fujlhdtt9tn57trnqkgi039&st=8hm018ks&raw=1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)![Plus](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/sw5siw0xwrg7prx9mb192/p.png?rlkey=0pavr0l7p8vkwrdcyi56lqoir&st=ayoevvfn&raw=1)[![EMF](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/prngjz65opz5l54kfy39z/e.png?rlkey=harnv3pqnasrdl3a3bk47s205&st=umph0hff&raw=1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features )or [![OptiFine](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/thfwderk9tgm9yzq281jx/optifine.jpg?rlkey=l89bglqjt5ixh9lqj1unk547a&raw=1)](https://optifine.net/downloads)  
The Formula replaces Minecraft boats with realistic Formula-style cars.  
Not affiliated with any official racing series.  

**Requires [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) + [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) (recommended), or [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads), to support custom models and textures.**  

Cars can be summoned using commands by specifying their name and number.

If no name is specified, or if the car is spawned from an item, a model is chosen at random, and its numberless variant is spawned with a random livery.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ryPDLyl_mlU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## ⌨️ How to Specify
CustomName values are case-insensitive.

`<car_name>` is required.  
If `<car_number>` is omitted, a numberless variant will be summoned.  

- Specifying only `<car_name>` spawns a numberless car with a random compound.  
- `<car_name>` and `<tyre_compound>` can be specified together.  
- `<car_name>` and `<car_number>` can be specified together.  
- `<car_name>`, `<car_number>`, and `<tyre_compound>` can all be specified together.

See Included Categories below for available categories and liveries.

**Boat Types:** `oak`/`spruce`/`birch`/`jungle`/`acacia`/`dark_oak`/`mangrove`/`cherry`/`pale_oak`

**MC1.21.3-1.21.10**
```
/summon <type>_boat ~ ~ ~ {CustomName: "<car_name>_<car_number>_<tyre_compound>"}
```

**MC1.19.4-1.21.1**
```
/summon boat ~ ~ ~ {Type:"<type>",CustomName:"\"<car_name>_<car_number>_<tyre_compound>\""}
```

**Example**

```
# MC1.21.3-1.21.10
/summon oak_boat ~ ~ ~ {CustomName: "rb22_3_soft"}
/summon oak_boat ~ ~ ~ {CustomName: "rb22_3"}
/summon oak_boat ~ ~ ~ {CustomName: "rb22_soft"}
/summon oak_boat ~ ~ ~ {CustomName: "rb22"}

# MC1.19.4-1.21.1
/summon boat ~ ~ ~ {Type:"oak",CustomName:"\"rb22_3_soft\""}
/summon boat ~ ~ ~ {Type:"oak",CustomName:"\"rb22_3\""}
/summon boat ~ ~ ~ {Type:"oak",CustomName:"\"rb22_soft\""}
/summon boat ~ ~ ~ {Type:"oak",CustomName:"\"rb22\""}
```

---

## 📝 Notes

Visual displays such as the steering wheel gear and rev LEDs are purely visual and do not reflect the boat's actual speed or behavior.

---

<details>
<summary>Compatibility</summary>

#### OptiFine
- Compatible with **1.19.4-OptiFine_HD_U_I3** and later
- Some animations or emissive textures may not function on certain versions
- OptiFine preview versions may cause issues with models or animations
#### Shaders
- Animation speed may vary depending on the shader environment
#### Lunar Client
- When _Turbo Entity Mode_ is enabled, entities may only render while moving and disappear when stationary

</details>

<details>
<summary>Rough Roadmap</summary>
Planned updates include models from other racing categories, as well as additional liveries.
</details>
